headline: Carrier Global Targets Data Center Growth With New AquaEdge 30CF Chiller
summary: Carrier Global (NYSE:CARR) has launched the AquaEdge 30CF air cooled centrifugal chiller, aimed at data center cooling needs. The system is designed to restore 100% cooling capacity in under three minutes after a power interruption. AquaEdge 30CF is built to operate across a wide temperature range to support mission critical data center workloads. Carrier Global, trading at $58.35, is leaning further into data center infrastructure with this new addition to its AquaEdge line. The stock...
